productDisplayName: Arrow Men Formal Coffee Brown Shoes
description: Classic five-hole lace-up shoe with clean, slim silhouetting and a refined stacked heel, by arrow for men. The strategic stitch detailing on this narrow derby shoe is a sartorial dream. The shoe is a minimalist's reinterpretation of the classic Derby. Wear this shoe crafted from Italian leather with slim Fit formal shirts and trousers. Upper Leather upper, has stitch detailing, with a tapering toe box Four-hole central lace-ups Padded leather lining Soft sockliner for instep comfort Padded tongue Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Branded grooves on the midfoot for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
